name: SweetPoll

unions.name: Model
unions.comment: Private state of the SweetPoll component

aliases.name: Config
aliases.type: { url : String, decoder : Decoder data, delay : Time, samesBeforeDelay : Int, delayMultiplier : Float, maxDelay : Time }

values.name: init
values.type: Config data -> ( Model data, Cmd (Msg data) )

values.name: update
values.comment:
The SweetPoll StartApp-style update function

Returns:
  - The new SweetPoll model
  - The current data, if there is any
  - A command to keep SweetPoll running
values.type: Msg data -> Model data -> ( Model data, Maybe data, Cmd (Msg data) )
